mechanism_narrative: A lower federal funds rate eases discount rates and supports equity valuations, so sustained declines in FEDFUNDS predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns are not higher than the unconditional average during months when FEDFUNDS is falling, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%, policy is restrictive enough to pressure liquidity and earnings multiples, so S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days are negative.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day returns more than 55% of the time, or if the average triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean by more than 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening income growth and deteriorating risk appetite, which should weigh on S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rise triggers are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the trigger-conditioned mean return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth and unemployment jointly encode labor-market breadth; when PAYEMS is rising and UNRATE is falling, the signal indicates resilient demand and supports S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-up/UNRATE-down condition does not outperform either single series alone, or if 60-day forward returns are not positive in the joint regime.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales accelerate, consumers are absorbing real activity and revenue expectations improve, so S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days should be positive.
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS acceleration is followed by negative 5-day returns more often than positive ones, or if the signal shows no positive short-horizon edge across rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production and housing starts together indicate synchronized real-economy expansion, which should lift cyclicals and the index over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO/HOUST signal fails to beat each standalone proxy, or if 60-day forward returns are not above baseline when both series rise together.

mechanism_narrative: A rising housing-starts series reflects stronger construction demand and household confidence, which should support equity returns over the next 20 trading days once the monthly change turns positive.
failure_condition: Reject if positive HOUST changes are followed by negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances, or if the conditional mean return is not greater than zero.

mechanism_narrative: In a cooling inflation regime, slower CPI growth combined with stable or lower policy rates reduces real-rate pressure and supports valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation decelerates for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if disinflation episodes with stable-or-falling FEDFUNDS do not yield above-baseline 20-day returns, or if the joint signal underperforms the CPI-only signal over rolling 3-year windows.
